## Linux Compat Syscalls

| Syscall | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| read, write, open, close | ✅ Full |  |
| fork, getpid | ✅ Full |  |
| mount, umount2 | ❌ Not supported |  |
| truncate, ftruncate | ❌ Not supported |  |
| fsync, fdatasync | ❌ Not supported |  |
| exit, exit_group | ✅ Full |  |
| mmap, munmap | ✅ Full |  |
| brk | ✅ Full |  |
| sigaction, sigreturn | 🧩 Stub |  |
| ioctl | 🟡 Partial |  |
| clock_gettime | ✅ Full |  |
| getdents64 | ✅ Full |  |
| stat | 🟡 Partial |  |

| VGA Text Mode | ✅ Full | ✅ Full | Stable |

| IWL WiFi | ❌ Not supported | 🟡 Partial | Alpha |
| VirtIO GPU | ✅ Full | ❌ Not supported | Beta |

| IOMMU | ✅ Full | 🟡 Partial | Alpha |
